title: LucasDotje's Story Mode Storm
description: A Texture Pack That Adds Story Mode Textures To Cracker's Wither Storm Mod
body:
Welcome To LucasDotje's Story Mode Storm Texture Pack 

 Maybe You Remember Minecraft Story Mode, This Is A Texture Pack For Cracker's Wither Storm Mod To Make It More Like Minecraft Story Mode

It Adds New Textures To The Wither Storm, Command Block Tools, Withered Blocks

Official Trailer : https://youtu.be/z9G_SRZc1y0

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/z9G_SRZc1y0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



Leave A Link To This Page If You Make A Video With This Texture Pack!!!!!!!!!



For If You Don't Know What Minecraft Story Mode Is : https://youtu.be/PvL3S9ILlpU
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PvL3S9ILlpU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


The Sounds + Most Of The Textures Are Made By Telltale Games And Antimo And Welles
